description_long: This object consists of three modern, single-story houses arranged in a row, each with a flat, brown roof and white exterior walls. The houses are connected by a large, open courtyard paved with brown tiles, featuring a central square area with palm trees and green landscaping. Each house has a small private patio or deck area, some with visible outdoor furniture and a pool. The landscaping includes multiple palm trees and neatly trimmed grass patches, creating a tropical, resort-like atmosphere. The windows and doors are large and rectangular, providing ample natural light and a contemporary look. The overall layout is symmetrical and open, emphasizing communal outdoor space and modern architectural lines.
description: A group of three modern, single-story houses with flat brown roofs, white walls, and a shared landscaped courtyard with palm trees and tiled walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of three houses, the central courtyard, and palm trees lining the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, private patios, pools, and the linear arrangement of palm trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades of the houses, additional landscaping, and the open courtyard layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patios, pools, and the arrangement of palm trees and green spaces adjacent to the houses.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple, ground-level entryways with large glass doors, no steps, and minimal overhangs, flanked by landscaping and tiled walkways.
